description:
Your calendar should understand you — not the other way around.

ChronoSync brings natural-language intelligence to every calendar you already use. Type "dinner with Sarah next Friday at 7" or speak it aloud, and ChronoSync parses your intent instantly, previewing the event in real time before you ever tap save. No forms. No friction. Just your words, turned into a perfectly formatted event in seconds.

WORKS WITH EVERY CALENDAR YOU ALREADY HAVE
ChronoSync connects directly to your iCloud, Google, Exchange, and Office 365 calendars through Apple's native EventKit — which means your existing events, colors, and invites are already waiting for you. Nothing is stored on a third-party server. Your data stays exactly where it has always been, and ChronoSync simply makes it beautiful.

BUILT FOR THE WHOLE APPLE ECOSYSTEM
From your iPhone to your Apple Watch to Apple Vision Pro, ChronoSync moves with you. Glance at your day from a watch complication, dictate a new event from your wrist, or spread your week across a spatial window in visionOS. Back on your iPhone, interactive Lock Screen and Home Screen widgets keep your next event always one glance away.

TRAVEL TIME AND SMART SCHEDULING
MapKit-powered Travel Time calculates how long you'll need to get there, and Leave-by alerts nudge you before it's too late. The daily Morning Brief sets your tone; load rings and open-slot suggestions help you schedule with intention.

EVERY DETAIL, COVERED
Scan a flyer or screenshot with Photo-to-Event OCR and ChronoSync reads the date, time, and location for you. Calendar Sets let you focus. Conflict detection catches double-bookings with one-tap rescheduling. Full-text search surfaces any event in seconds. And a single tap opens Zoom, Google Meet, Microsoft Teams, or Webex.

PREMIUM, THE WAY IT SHOULD BE
ChronoSync Premium unlocks the full cross-device experience with a single one-time purchase. No subscription. No monthly fee. Pay once and ChronoSync is yours, across every device, for good.

Your calendar should work as fast as you think. ChronoSync does.

Download ChronoSync and take back your day.

Terms of Use: https://chronosync.app/terms
Privacy Policy: https://chronosync.app/privacy
promotionalText: Create events in plain English, sync across iPhone, Watch & Vision Pro, and unlock Premium once — forever. No subscription. Ever.
